      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "\n",
        "# Load dataset\n",
        "df = pd.read_csv(\"Cleaned_Students_Performance.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Check data\n",
        "print(df.head())\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# DATA CLEANING\n",
        "\n",
        "# Check missing values\n",
        "print(df.isnull().sum())\n",
        "\n",
        "# Remove missing values (even if none exist)\n",
        "df = df.dropna()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Check data types\n",
        "print(df.dtypes)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Basic statistics\n",
        "print(df.describe())"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "VtOs6m-Sz2aa",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# RELATIONAL PLOT MATH SCIRE VS READING SCORE\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))\n",
        "\n",
        "sns.scatterplot(\n",
        "    x='math_score',\n",
        "        y='reading_score',\n",
        "            data=df,\n",
        "                color='royalblue',\n",
        "                    s=50,\n",
        "                        edgecolor='black',\n",
        "                            alpha=0.7   # transparency for better visibility\n",
        "                            )\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title(\"Relationship between Math and Reading Scores\", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Math Score\", fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Reading Score\", fontsize=12)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [

        "\n",
        "#CATEGORICAL PLOT\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ------------------------\n",
        "# STATISTICAL PLOT (HEATMAP)\n",
        "# ------------------------\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10,8))\n",
        "\n",
        "sns.heatmap(\n",
        "    df.corr(numeric_only=True),\n",
        "        annot=True,          # shows values\n",
        "            cmap='coolwarm',     # color style\n",
        "                fmt=\".2f\",           # decimal format\n",
        "                    linewidths=0.5\n",
        "                    )\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title(\"Correlation Heatmap of Student Scores\", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 586
        },

      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# STATISTICAL MOMENTS\n",
        "\n",
        "# Mean: Average value of each numeric column\n",
        "mean_values = df.mean(numeric_only=True)\n",
        "print(\"Mean:\\n\", mean_values)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Variance: Measures how spread out the data is from the mean\n",
        "variance_values = df.var(numeric_only=True)\n",
        "print(\"\\nVariance:\\n\", variance_values)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Skewness: Indicates the symmetry of the data distribution\n",
        "skewness_values = df.skew(numeric_only=True)\n",
        "print(\"\\nSkewness:\\n\", skewness_values)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Kurtosis: Measures the presence of outliers (tail heaviness)\n",
        "kurtosis_values = df.kurtosis(numeric_only=True)\n",
        "print(\"\\nKurtosis:\\n\", kurtosis_values)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },

      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# SELECT FEATURES FOR CLUSTERING\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "X = df[['math_score', 'reading_score', 'writing_score', 'average_score']]\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# SCALING DATA\n",
        "\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "X_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# APPLY KMEANS CLUSTERING\n",
        "\n",
        "from sklearn.cluster import KMeans\n",
        "\n",
        "kmeans = KMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=42)\n",
        "clusters = kmeans.fit_predict(X_scaled)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Add cluster labels to dataset\n",
        "df['Cluster'] = clusters\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# CLUSTER VISUALIZATION\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))\n",
        "\n",
        "sns.scatterplot(\n",
        "    x='math_score',\n",
        "        y='reading_score',\n",
        "            hue='Cluster',\n",
        "                data=df,\n",
        "                    palette='Set1',\n",
        "                        s=60\n",
        "                        )\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title(\"Clustering of Students based on Scores\", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Math Score\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Reading Score\")\n",
        "plt.grid(True)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 518
        },
        "id": "ufsCE1Ct70t9",
        "outputId": "42623dfb-b086-476f-a7b5-7fea7f5b39cf"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 800x600 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# SELECT DATA FOR REGRESSION\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "X = df[['math_score']]   # independent variable\n",
        "y = df['reading_score']  # dependent variable\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# LINEAR REGRESSION MODEL\n",
        "\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression\n",
        "\n",
        "model = LinearRegression()\n",
        "model.fit(X, y)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# PREDICTIONS\n",
        "\n",
        "y_pred = model.predict(X)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# REGRESSION PLOT\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Actual data points\n",
        "plt.scatter(X, y, color='blue', alpha=0.6, label='Actual Data')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Fitted regression line\n",
        "plt.plot(X, y_pred, color='red', linewidth=2, label='Fitted Line')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title(\"Linear Regression: Math Score vs Reading Score\", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Math Score\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Reading Score\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "plt.grid(True)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
